title: ClipRankPayload — the JSON the pod PUTs for kind=clip_rank
description: Numbers only, no ranking and no threshold: one entry per request group, in request order. The cosine runs on the pod inside the same fp16/no_grad block as the towers, so scores and image embeddings come out of ONE forward — the planner's MMR dedup needs the embeddings. The reorder, the relevance floor and the dedup are planner decisions and never cross back.

scores.description: Cosine(image, intent) per image, order mirrors the request group's image_urls. -1.0 = unreadable image, or an embed-only group (intent "") where a score has nothing to mean.

embeds.description: L2-normalized image embedding per image, same order; null for an image the pod could not fetch or decode.
